evals.prompt: I want every analysis notebook to automatically record which code produced which output dataset, and register my processed AnnData as a versioned, queryable artifact. How do I set this up with LaminDB?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-lamindb. Uses ln.track() at the start and ln.finish() at the end to capture lineage (Run/Transform), creates a versioned Artifact (e.g. ln.Artifact.from_anndata(...).save()) with a hierarchical key, and notes view_lineage() for provenance.

assertions.value: Captures lineage with ln.track()/ln.finish() and saves a versioned Artifact.

evals.prompt: Before I curate my scRNA-seq dataset I want to validate and standardize the cell type labels in adata.obs against a proper ontology so my annotations are FAIR.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-lamindb. Imports the cell-type ontology via Bionty (bt.CellType.import_source()), standardizes labels with bt.CellType.standardize(...), validates/curates with AnnDataCurator, and links ontology annotations to the saved artifact.

assertions.value: Uses Bionty cell-type ontology to validate and standardize obs labels before curation.

evals.prompt: I've registered dozens of scRNA-seq batches in LaminDB annotated with tissue and condition. Now I want to query for all PBMC treated datasets and load them for analysis.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-lamindb. Uses ln.Artifact.filter(...) with feature/key filters (e.g. key__startswith='scrna/', tissue='PBMC', condition='treated'), retrieves the matching artifacts, and loads them with artifact.load(). May mention to_dataframe() and querying metadata before loading large files.

assertions.value: Queries artifacts by annotated features/keys, then loads the matching datasets.

evals.prompt: I run a Nextflow pipeline and want each process to pull its input dataset from LaminDB and register its output back so the whole pipeline's lineage is tracked.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-lamindb. Shows ln.track() inside the process, ln.Artifact.get(key=...) + .cache() to fetch inputs, saving outputs as new Artifacts with keys, and ln.finish(), describing the Nextflow/workflow-manager integration pattern.

assertions.value: Wires ln.track()/ln.finish() and Artifact get/save into a Nextflow workflow for lineage.

evals.prompt: I have a raw scRNA-seq AnnData object and want to run QC filtering, normalization, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and UMAP.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-scanpy. The user wants the single-cell analysis pipeline (QC, normalization, dimensionality reduction, clustering), not data registration, curation, or lineage management.

evals.prompt: I want to pull a public cell-by-gene dataset from the CELLxGENE Census and subset it to lung tissue for my analysis.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-cellxgene. The user wants to query/download from the CELLxGENE Census atlas, not register/curate/version their own datasets in a LaminDB instance.
